prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年65名持续上升至2026年52名，学校综合实力稳步提升；2023年曾出现偏负面管理事件，但近年无新增重大舆情；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频曝光量中等偏低；未见投档断档记录；食品科学与工程A+（全国顶尖），与物理类招生专业食品科学与工程直接对应；轻 工技术与工程A+，对相关工科专业有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等专业社会热 度持续走高，食品科学与工程（一般观望，较往年改善）；本省2026年高考总人数377900，较2025年大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约22.94万人，竞争基数明显扩大；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属东部沿海地区，对西南省份考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校全国招生以江苏、山东等东部省份为主，云南 招生占比约1%–2%，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类近年位次波动平稳、2026年计划大幅扩招58%以及本省考生总数增长32%，扩招幅度显著大于考生增幅，整体竞争 趋于缓和；但计算机、电子信息等热门专业热度持续走高可能吸引更多高分考生报考，对位次形成上移压力。，结合热门专业热度对冲部分扩招红利，；预测最低位次约10423名，区间9923–10923名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 8574 → 7397 → 6780 → 8137 → 7869. From 2021 to 2023, rankings continuously moved forward, then moved back in 2024, and remained basically flat in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 7869. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 10 → 10 → 10 → 10 from 2021 to 2024 for Science Category, and 12 in 2025 for Physics Category. The 2026 plan is 19, an increase of 58.3% compared to 2025, significantly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has continuously risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, indicating steady improvement in overall strength. There was a negative management incident in 2023, but no major new public opinion issues in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderately low short video exposure. No records of enrollment gaps. Food Science and Engineering is A+ (top nationally), directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the Physics Category enrollment. Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, supporting related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) continue to see rising social popularity. Food Science and Engineering (generally wait-and-see, improved compared to previous years). The total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 229,400, indicating a substantially expanded competition base. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the eastern coastal region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. The university's national enrollment mainly focuses on eastern provinces such as Jiangsu and Shandong, with Yunnan enrollment accounting for about 1%–2%, not a primary source region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable fluctuation of Physics Category rankings in recent years, the significant 58% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the 32% increase in total provincial candidates, the expansion rate is significantly larger than the candidate growth rate, leading to an overall easing of competition. However, the continued high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information may attract more high-scoring candidates, exerting upward pressure on rankings. Combining the offsetting effect of hot major popularity on some of the expansion benefits, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10,423, with a range of 9,923 to 10,923.

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Lihu Campus).

Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, Tier 1 as a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 9,923), prioritize reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation. For rankings near the upper bound of the range (around 10,923), it is advisable to choose Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline) and Preventive Medicine as stable options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 1815 → 2148 → 1997 → 2251 → 3165, showing an overall backward trend, especially in 2025, which shifted back by about 914 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 3165. The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 10 → 10 → 10 → 9 students for Liberal Arts, and 9 students for History Category in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6 students, a 33.3% reduction compared to 2025, significantly increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in overall strength. There was a slightly negative management incident in 2023, but no major new public opinion in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with medium-low short video exposure. No records of file dropping or gaps. Food Science and Engineering is A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level, but the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, English) have low relevance to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended in 2024), while English has average popularity and is wait-and-see. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (History Category + Science Category total approximately 285,688). The estimated number of History Category candidates is about 148,500, significantly expanding the competition base. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the eastern coastal region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for southwestern province candidates but is not a hot destination. The university's national enrollment mainly focuses on eastern provinces such as Jiangsu and Shandong, with Yunnan enrollment accounting for about 1%–2%, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift of History Category rankings in recent years, the significant 33% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the notable increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the trend of intensified competition is clear. However, considering the additional pressure from the expansion of the candidate pool, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2732, with a range of 2240–3224.
